title.en: HE-MCS rate tables: 1024-QAM, MCS 10/11, and rate-per-RU
title.zh: HE-MCS 速率表：1024-QAM、MCS 10/11 与每 RU 速率

blocks.en: We have talked about MCS as an abstract index and about RUs as slices of tones. Now let's turn the dial into real numbers. An HE PHY data rate is not one number — it is a lookup. You pick four knobs: which HE-MCS (0 through 11), how big the resource unit is (26, 52, 106, 242, 484, 996, or 2×996 tones), how many spatial streams you run (1 to 8), and which guard interval (0.8, 1.6, or 3.2 µs). Those four together index a single cell in the standard's rate tables, and that cell is your data rate. Change any knob and the rate moves.
blocks.zh: 我们已经把 MCS 当作一个抽象的索引来讲过，也讲过 RU 是把子载波切成的小块。现在让我们把旋钮换算成真实的数字。HE PHY 的数据速率不是单一一个数——它是一次查表。你要拨四个旋钮：选哪个 HE-MCS（0 到 11）、资源单元（RU）有多大（26、52、106、242、484、996 或 2×996 个子载波）、跑几条空间流（1 到 8），以及用哪种保护间隔（0.8、1.6 或 3.2 µs）。这四者合起来在标准的速率表里定位到唯一一个单元格，那个单元格就是你的数据速率。任意拨动一个旋钮，速率就会随之改变。

blocks.en: Wi-Fi 6 extended the MCS ladder past where 802.11ac stopped. 11ac topped out at MCS 9 with 256-QAM. HE adds two new rungs: MCS 10 and MCS 11, both using 1024-QAM. 1024-QAM packs 10 bits into every constellation symbol instead of 256-QAM's 8 — a 25% jump in raw bits per symbol on the densest modulation. MCS 10 pairs 1024-QAM with a 3/4 coding rate; MCS 11 pairs it with 5/6, squeezing the most bits onto the air. Support for MCS 8, 9, 10, and 11 is optional in all cases — the bottom rungs (0–7) are the mandatory floor every HE device must climb.
blocks.zh: Wi-Fi 6 把 MCS 阶梯延伸到了 802.11ac 止步之处的更高一层。11ac 在使用 256-QAM 的 MCS 9 封顶。HE 新增了两级：MCS 10 和 MCS 11，二者都使用 1024-QAM。1024-QAM 在每个星座符号里塞进 10 个比特，而 256-QAM 只有 8 个——在最密集的调制方式上，每符号原始比特数提升了 25%。MCS 10 把 1024-QAM 配上 3/4 的编码率；MCS 11 配上 5/6，把最多的比特挤上空口。MCS 8、9、10、11 的支持在所有情形下都是可选的——最底下的几级（0–7）才是每台 HE 设备都必须攀上的强制底线。

blocks.en: The standard organises these rate tables by RU size. Clause 27.5 has one subclause per tone count: 27.5.2 for the 26-tone RU, 27.5.3 for 52-tone, then 106, 242, 484, 996, and finally 27.5.8 for 2×996. Each subclause holds eight tables — one per spatial-stream count from 1 to 8. So to read a rate you navigate RU → subclause, then stream count → table, then MCS row × guard-interval column → cell.
blocks.zh: 标准把这些速率表按 RU 大小来组织。27.5 节里每种子载波数对应一个子条款：27.5.2 是 26-tone RU、27.5.3 是 52-tone，接着是 106、242、484、996，最后 27.5.8 是 2×996。每个子条款里有八张表——对应 1 到 8 条空间流各一张。所以要查一个速率，你先按 RU 找到子条款，再按空间流数找到对应的表，最后用 MCS 行 × 保护间隔列定位到单元格。

blocks.en: Why does RU size matter so much? Because tones carry data. A 26-tone RU is a thin straw; a 2×996-tone RU (a full 160 MHz worth of tones) is a fire hose. The same MCS 11 modulation that yields a trickle on 26 tones becomes a torrent on 2×996 tones, because there are roughly 80× more data-bearing subcarriers underneath it. The whole point of OFDMA is that an AP can hand a tiny 26-tone RU to a sensor that only needs a sip of bandwidth, while pouring a 2×996-tone RU into a 4K-streaming laptop — both at the same instant.
blocks.zh: 为什么 RU 大小如此重要？因为承载数据的是子载波。26-tone RU 是一根细吸管；2×996-tone RU（相当于整整 160 MHz 的子载波）则是一根消防水管。同样的 MCS 11 调制，在 26 个子载波上只能涓涓细流，到了 2×996 个子载波上就变成滔滔洪流，因为底下承载数据的子载波多了大约 80 倍。OFDMA 的全部意义正在于此：AP 可以把一个小小的 26-tone RU 分给只需要一小口带宽的传感器，同时把一个 2×996-tone RU 倾注给正在看 4K 视频的笔记本——而且就在同一瞬间。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 420 220" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12"><text x="10" y="18" fill="currentColor" font-size="13">MCS 11 (1024-QAM, R=5/6), 1 stream, 0.8 us GI</text><g stroke="currentColor" fill="none" stroke-width="1"><line x1="100" y1="40" x2="100" y2="205"/><line x1="100" y1="205" x2="410" y2="205"/></g><g fill="currentColor"><text x="10" y="60">26-tone</text><rect x="100" y="50" width="6" height="14"/><text x="10" y="85">52-tone</text><rect x="100" y="75" width="13" height="14"/><text x="10" y="110">106-tone</text><rect x="100" y="100" width="27" height="14"/><text x="10" y="135">242-tone</text><rect x="100" y="125" width="62" height="14"/><text x="10" y="160">484-tone</text><rect x="100" y="150" width="125" height="14"/><text x="10" y="185">996-tone</text><rect x="100" y="175" width="258" height="14"/></g><text x="120" y="200" fill="currentColor" font-size="10">bar length proportional to data-bearing tones</text></svg>

caption.en: Same modulation, very different rate: at a fixed MCS, stream count, and guard interval, the achievable rate scales with the number of data-bearing tones in the RU. A 26-tone RU is a trickle next to the wide RUs.
caption.zh: 调制相同，速率却天差地别：在 MCS、空间流数、保护间隔都固定时，可达速率随 RU 中承载数据的子载波数成比例增长。与宽 RU 相比，26-tone RU 只是涓涓细流。

blocks.en: Two more multipliers ride on top. Spatial streams multiply almost linearly: eight streams carry close to eight times the bits of one stream over the same RU, which is how an 8×8 AP on a 2×996 RU at MCS 11 reaches multi-gigabit headline numbers. The guard interval trims overhead: a 0.8 µs GI gives the highest rate, 1.6 µs and 3.2 µs trade a little throughput for robustness against delay spread. So the published peak rate always quotes the most aggressive corner — widest RU, most streams, top MCS, shortest GI.
blocks.zh: 在此之上还叠着两个乘数。空间流几乎是线性倍增：在同一个 RU 上，八条流承载的比特接近一条流的八倍——这正是 8×8 的 AP 在 2×996 RU、MCS 11 下能冲上数 Gbps 标称值的原因。保护间隔则削减开销：0.8 µs 的 GI 给出最高速率，1.6 µs 和 3.2 µs 则用一点吞吐换取对时延扩展的鲁棒性。所以公布的峰值速率总是引用最激进的那个角落——最宽的 RU、最多的流、最高的 MCS、最短的 GI。

blocks.en: There is no free lunch at the top of the ladder. 1024-QAM crams its constellation points so tightly that the receiver must tell apart very small differences in amplitude and phase. That demands a clean link — high SNR, low EVM, minimal phase noise. MCS 10 and 11 only stand up at short range with a strong, quiet signal; the moment the link degrades, the rate adaptation logic drops back to a lower MCS that the channel can actually carry.
blocks.zh: 阶梯顶端没有免费的午餐。1024-QAM 把星座点排得极其紧密，接收机必须分辨幅度与相位上非常细微的差异。这要求一条干净的链路——高 SNR、低 EVM、极小的相位噪声。MCS 10 和 11 只有在近距离、信号强而安静时才立得住；链路一旦恶化，速率自适应逻辑就会回退到信道实际能承载的更低 MCS。

summary.en: Reading the actual peak: the aPSDUMaxLength NOTE
summary.zh: 读出真正的峰值：aPSDUMaxLength 的 NOTE 注解

blocks.en: Clause 27.5.1 states the scope plainly: the rate-dependent parameters for every RU size (26 through 2×996, NSS = 1…8) live in subclauses 27.5.2 through 27.5.8, and support for HE-MCS 8, 9, 10, and 11 is optional in all cases. NDBPS — the data bits per OFDM symbol that ultimately set the rate — is computed as NCBPS × R, the coded bits per symbol times the coding rate. The HE PHY characteristics table (Table 27-61) then pins down the most aggressive corner of the whole rate space in its aPSDUMaxLength NOTE: 6 500 631 octets, achieved by an HE SU PPDU at 160 MHz / 80+80 MHz using a 2×996 RU, HE-MCS 11, 8 spatial streams, 0.8 µs GI, 1× HE-LTF, LDPC coding, and pre-FEC padding factor 4 — limited by the 398 Data-field OFDM symbols that fit inside aPPDUMaxTime of 5.484 ms. That single NOTE is the rate tables' headline corner made concrete.
blocks.zh: 27.5.1 节直白地给出了范围：每种 RU 大小（26 到 2×996，NSS = 1…8）的速率相关参数分布在 27.5.2 到 27.5.8 各子条款中，且 HE-MCS 8、9、10、11 的支持在所有情形下都是可选的。NDBPS——最终决定速率的每 OFDM 符号数据比特数——按 NCBPS × R 计算，即每符号编码比特数乘以编码率。随后，HE PHY 特性表（Table 27-61）在其 aPSDUMaxLength 的 NOTE 注解里钉死了整个速率空间最激进的那个角落：6 500 631 个八位字节，由一个 160 MHz / 80+80 MHz、采用 2×996 RU、HE-MCS 11、8 条空间流、0.8 µs GI、1× HE-LTF、LDPC 编码、pre-FEC 填充因子为 4 的 HE SU PPDU 达成——受限于 5.484 ms 的 aPPDUMaxTime 内能容纳的 398 个数据字段 OFDM 符号。这条 NOTE 就是速率表那个标称峰值角落的具体化身。

cites.note: 27.5.1-27.5.8 — HE-MCS rate-dependent parameters per RU (26/52/106/242/484/996/2x996 tones), NSS 1-8; MCS 8/9/10/11 optional; NDBPS = NCBPS x R; Table 27-61 aPSDUMaxLength NOTE pins the 2x996 / MCS 11 / 8-SS / 0.8us-GI peak
